dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Alright, gentlemen, I need you to understand the situation. We're experiencing some engine trouble."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "What's going on? Why are we flying like this?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his brow furrowed in concern.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "I told you we should've taken the train."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of SAM, looking anxious.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We're doing everything we can to stabilize the engines. Just stay seated and keep your seatbelts fastened."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, a smug expression on his face.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Excuse me, gentlemen, but I need to go through the emergency procedures with you."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of the cockpit, Ali's hands moving swiftly across the controls.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of KATRINA, her voice calm and soothing.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "We're going to have to make an emergency landing. Please make sure your seatbelts are securely fastened."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KATRINA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We'll get through this, folks. Just hang on."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of KATRINA, her eyes scanning the passengers.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "This is ridiculous. We're going to die."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of the exterior of the plane, the engines roaring as it shakes and lurches through the air.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Sir, please remain calm. We're doing everything we can to ensure your safety."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, his face pale with fear.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Mayday, Mayday! We're experiencing engine failure! Requesting assistance!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "What's happening? Are we going to make it?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his voice strained with urgency.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Everyone, please remain seated and keep your seatbelts fastened. We're going to try and land safely."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of SAM, his eyes fixed on Ali.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "This is insane. We should've taken the train."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of the cockpit, the tension palpable.
